title: rubus perdigitatus
intro: Rubus perdigitatus, also known as the Digitated Raspberry or Thimbleberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus perdigitatus include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Rubus perdigitatus can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
